result.finding: Application uses a minimal Spring profile setup with one environment-specific profile: 'mysql'. The default application.properties targets MySQL via database=mysql, while application-mysql.properties overrides datasource settings with environment variable-based connection strings. One Maven build profile 'css' handles Bootstrap CSS unpacking. No dev/test/staging/prod Spring profiles or @Profile-annotated beans exist.
evidence: src/main/resources/application.properties: sets database=mysql as default (no explicit spring.profiles.active)
src/main/resources/application-mysql.properties: MySQL-specific datasource configuration with env var placeholders
No application-dev.properties, application-test.properties, application-staging.properties, application-prod.properties found
No @Profile annotations found in any Java source files
pom.xml <profiles>: single 'css' Maven profile for Bootstrap WebJar CSS unpacking (build-time only)
No docker-compose or Kubernetes environment-specific configs found
Spring Boot test scope uses H2 in-memory DB via TestContainers
values: Maven build profiles: css (1 build-time profile for CSS generation)
Activation method: Spring profile active by default when using MySQL datasource URL
Environment distinction handled via environment variables, not Spring profiles
